TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Billy Ray Bates == Billy Ray Bates sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1956, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Billy Ray Bates, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Billy Ray Bates htagan beh sa Frank ru Ellen Bates.te spat laqi na qutux ngasal. Billy Ray Bates hiya yaba ga ppqumah,Billy Ray Bates laqi nya.mrkay's maki Mississippi sharecroppers. Billy Ray Bates mzyu mari maki McAdams gocyu.suruw lga mzyu mari maki Kentucky hopa pqwasan biru. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == βillj raj βates~ɕ == βillj raj βates~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βillj raj βates~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βillj raj βates~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *rank ru ellen βates~ɕ.te s~ɕpat laqi na qutux ŋas~ɕal. βillj raj βates~ɕ ħija jaβa ɣa ppqumaħ,βillj raj βates~ɕ laqi nja.mrkajʔs~ɕ maki mis~ɕs~ɕis~ɕs~ɕippi s~ɕħareʦ~ʨroppers~ɕ. βillj raj βates~ɕ mzju mari maki mʦ~ʨa*ams~ɕ ɣoʦ~ʨju.s~ɕuruw lɣa mzju mari maki kentuʦ~ʨkj ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Billy Ray Bates == Billy Ray Bates sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1956, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Billy Ray Bates, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Billy Ray Bates htagan beh sa Frank ru Ellen Bates.te spat laqi na qutux ngasal. Billy Ray Bates hiya yaba ga ppqumah,Billy Ray Bates laqi nya.mrkay's maki Mississippi sharecroppers. Billy Ray Bates mzyu mari maki McAdams gocyu.suruw lga mzyu mari maki Kentucky hopa pqwasan biru. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == βillj raj βates~ɕ == βillj raj βates~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βillj raj βates~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βillj raj βates~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *rank ru ellen βates~ɕ.te s~ɕpat laqi na qutux ŋas~ɕal. βillj raj βates~ɕ ħija jaβa ɣa ppqumaħ,βillj raj βates~ɕ laqi nja.mrkajʔs~ɕ maki mis~ɕs~ɕis~ɕs~ɕippi s~ɕħareʦ~ʨroppers~ɕ. βillj raj βates~ɕ mzju mari maki mʦ~ʨa*ams~ɕ ɣoʦ~ʨju.s~ɕuruw lɣa mzju mari maki kentuʦ~ʨkj ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
